Grid resolves to 12 by 10 cells. Environment reads as obstacle-heavy. Hill country dominates, but usable access corridors should help movement and recovery routes. summary_json.assumptions_summary: Battery is modeled in sortie energy units with 3-minute steps. Reserve logic follows the balanced profile.
summary_json.known_limitations_summary: The simulator is still symbolic and grid-based rather than a full aerodynamics or flight-control model. Mixed fleets influence planning, battery burden, and recommendation quality more than per-aircraft physics.

warnings.label: High Risk
warnings.title: Weather increases battery burden
warnings.summary: Wind and weather are likely to reduce effective search time and increase turnover pressure.
warnings.recommendation: Use a higher reserve margin and expect slower time to confirmation than in calm conditions.

warnings.label: Warning
warnings.title: Terrain and slope will slow clean coverage
warnings.summary: Steeper ground increases route cost and makes broad, even coverage harder to sustain.
warnings.recommendation: Favor patterns that respect battery margin and expect more deliberate lane spacing.

warnings.label: Warning
warnings.title: Confirmation burden is elevated
warnings.summary: Terrain and visibility conditions are likely to create more cue and inspect activity before confirmation.
warnings.recommendation: Expect more inspection passes and give extra attention to confirmation timing in the recommendation briefing.

feasibility_summary.operator_summary: Mission is possible, but the current setup carries high operational risk.
feasibility_summary.next_watch: Wind and weather are likely to reduce effective search time and increase turnover pressure.

summary_json.search_pattern_summary: Begins with structured coverage, then shifts drones toward clues, inspections, and under-covered sectors. The mission is currently tightening around possible contact activity.
summary_json.search_pattern_reason: The mission started with sector split, but it has shifted into adaptive rebalance because possible contact activity.
summary_json.search_pattern_fit_summary: Best when several drones can search in parallel without crowding each other. Current spacing is built around an effective swath of about 5.0 cells. Hill Country is the dominant ground type.

sensing_summary.operator_summary: No active contacts are awaiting confirmation.

confidence_summary.fleet_package: 8 General purpose drone staged from Primary staging point available for this mission.
confidence_summary.confidence_reason: Results are directionally useful, but terrain, weather, or timing spread still matter.

recommendation_uncertainty_summary.confidence_reason: Results are directionally useful, but terrain, weather, or timing spread still matter.

modeled_assumptions: Battery is tracked in sortie energy units and converted to percent for display only.
Route energy sums terrain, wind, and slope penalties over planned cell paths.
Detection uses staged cue, inspect, and confirm logic rather than instant target certainty.
Grid resolution and AOI size define operational scale for coverage and transit burden.
calibrated_estimates: Terrain energy multipliers are tuned for relative operational burden rather than field-certified consumption.
Weather and slope penalties are calibrated estimates intended to keep route costs believable and stable.
Cue and confirmation visibility factors are benchmarked against scenario families, not against live sensor telemetry.
Turnaround timing is treated as an operational estimate that includes swap, recharge, and basic servicing.
known_limitations: The simulator is still symbolic and grid-based rather than a full aerodynamics or flight-control model.
Mixed fleets influence planning, battery burden, and recommendation quality more than per-aircraft physics.
Benchmarks validate reasonableness within bounded SAR-style scenarios, not all field conditions.
Weather and terrain inputs are deterministic planning approximations rather than live onboard measurements.

provenance_manifest.assumptions_summary: Battery is modeled in sortie energy units with 3-minute steps. Reserve logic follows the balanced profile.
provenance_manifest.known_limitations_summary: The simulator is still symbolic and grid-based rather than a full aerodynamics or flight-control model. Mixed fleets influence planning, battery burden, and recommendation quality more than per-aircraft physics.
